text:
CMMI_SECT_1115A_DEMO_IND_10 

CMMI_SECT_1115A_DEMO_IND_11 

CMMI_SECT_1115A_DEMO_IND_12 

LABEL: Indicator of Enrollment in CMMI Section 1115A Demonstration — January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary was ever enrolled in a Section 1115A demonstration during 
the month. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months. 1115A is a CMS Center for 
Medicare & Medicaid Innovation (CMMI) demonstration. 

SHORT NAME: CMMI_SECT_1115A_DEMO_IND_01
